prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; History of myocardial infarction
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 80.9 kg; Height 179.2 cm; BMI 25.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 9.4%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 253mg/dL; 9 months ago 263mg/dL; 6 months ago 233mg/dL; 3 months ago 231mg/dL; current 161mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 82.7kg; 9 months ago 77.6kg; 6 months ago 80.9kg; 3 months ago 76.3kg; current 80.9kg), Height (12 months ago 179.2cm; 9 months ago 179.2cm; 6 months ago 179.2cm; 3 months ago 179.2cm; current 179.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 43U/L; 9 months ago 43U/L; 6 months ago 41U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 39U/L), AST (12 months ago 52U/L; 9 months ago 57U/L; 6 months ago 56U/L; 3 months ago 46U/L; current 52U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 119mg/g; 9 months ago 126mg/g; 6 months ago 103mg/g; 3 months ago 144mg/g; current 80mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 101mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 101mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 49mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 115mg/dL; 6 months ago 119mg/dL; 3 months ago 132mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
